# templates/

This directory is deployed to S3 by CDK (`BucketDeployment` in `packages/cdk/lib/constructs/storage.ts`).

The full directory structure is preserved — subdirectories become S3 key prefixes. For example:

```
templates/
  onboarding/
    welcome.html        → S3 key: onboarding/welcome.html
    day-3.html          → S3 key: onboarding/day-3.html
  trial-expiring/
    last-chance.html    → S3 key: trial-expiring/last-chance.html
```

State machines reference templates by these keys (e.g. `templateKey: "onboarding/welcome"`).

**Do not edit files here directly** — they are generated by running `pnpm --filter @step-func-emailer/hello-world render` from the React Email sources in `examples/hello-world/src/emails/`.
